summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Logi3A Soluções iteration 3. All backend APIs (leituras CRUD and image upload) fully functional with 11/11 tests passing. Frontend pages load correctly: /historico (bug fix verified), /scanner-qr (no JS errors), /gerador-conteudo (new feature with 5 tabs working).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/leituras creates scan record with status 201
Backend: GET /api/leituras returns list of scan records
Backend: GET /api/leituras?tipo_leitura=qrcode filters correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/leituras clears all records
Backend: POST /api/upload-image accepts PNG files
Backend: POST /api/upload-image accepts JPEG files
Backend: POST /api/upload-image rejects invalid file types (400 error)
Backend: GET /api/materiais returns materials list
Backend: POST /api/seed creates demo data
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/ returns API version info
Frontend: Home page loads with /gerador-conteudo link present
Frontend: /historico page loads without crash (bug fix verified)
Frontend: /historico has search input, filters, export CSV/PDF buttons
Frontend: /scanner-qr page loads without JavaScript errors
Frontend: /scanner-qr has operation select and start camera button
Frontend: /gerador-conteudo page loads (new feature)
Frontend: /gerador-conteudo has all 5 tabs (Texto, Mensagem, Instrução, Link, Imagem)
Frontend: QR Code generation from text input works correctly
Frontend: Educational sections 'Como Funciona o QR Code' expandable
Frontend: Educational sections 'O que você aprende' expandable
Frontend: Header.js includes QR Conteúdo in navItems array
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates and deletes test leituras during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 3 are working. Backend leituras CRUD endpoints verified. Frontend pages /historico, /scanner-qr, and /gerador-conteudo all load without errors. The GeradorConteudo page has QR code generation working with educational content expandable sections. Header.js includes QR Conteúdo navigation link at line 39 in navItems array.

bug_fixes./historico_page_crash: FIXED - Page loads correctly with leituras from AppContext
bug_fixes./scanner-qr_js_errors: FIXED - Page loads without errors, uses createLeitura and activityMode from AppContext

new_features./gerador-conteudo_page: WORKING - 5 tabs for Texto, Mensagem, Instrução, Link, Imagem
new_features.qr_code_generation: WORKING - Generates QR code from text input
new_features.educational_sections: WORKING - Both expandable sections work correctly

navigation.home_page_link: PRESENT - /gerador-conteudo link exists on home page
navigation.header_navigation: PRESENT - QR Conteúdo link in Header.js navItems
